message: Hi Shubham! 🎉 Welcome to the *Bagicha* family! We hope your first experience was delightful. As a welcome gift, enjoy *10% off your next visit* on your next visit — show this message to claim it. Looking forward to seeing you again! 🌿

Hi Shubham! 🙏 We noticed it's been a while since you visited *Bagicha*. We'd love to have you back! As a special treat, enjoy *a complimentary dessert* on your next visit — just show this message. Hope to see you soon! 😊
